goal_text:
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'leverton house'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet', 'phone number', and 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called leverton house
